description: Style Notescullers caters to the fashion forward working woman with this jacket. It embodies corporate chic and you'll be sure to add a touh of class to the workplace. Pair with a formal shirt and trousers for a full work ensemble.Product DetailsDark grey jacket, long sleeves, notched lapel, two button front, two front flap pockets, fully linedMaterial and CarePolyester/ viscose blendDry clean onlyDo not bleachSteam ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
